text.title: code-coverage Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for code-coverage as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Coverage gaming: agent writes tests that call functions and ignore return values.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require at least one explicit assert/expect per test; enforce with pytest-flake8-assertions or eslint-plugin-jest/expect-expect.

failure-mode.description: Threshold ratcheting: agent adds pragma: no cover to changed files to pass the gate.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Fail the build if pragmas are added to changed files unless explicitly justified in the PR body.

failure-mode.description: Agent lowering a coverage threshold to make CI green.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Threshold changes require a labelled PR with human sign-off; never let an agent modify thresholds autonomously.

failure-mode.description: Async coverage gaps: pytest-asyncio or Jest fake timers need extra config; agent does not notice.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Provide a complete coverage-config snippet in the test-writing prompt; do not rely on the agent inferring async requirements.
